name: Grilled Cervena Striploin on Mixed Root Veget
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Red Bliss potatoes, boiled, peeled and diced
3 medium Red beets, boiled, peeled and diced
2 medium Celery roots, diced and boiled
4 medium Red onions, peeled and sliced julienne
1 Granny Smith apple (optional), cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl. Rub the mixture on both sides of the striploins, wrap them tightly in plastic wrap, and refrigerate overnight.
2. Cook all root vegetables individually in salted water until tender but not soft. Test by tasting. Drain the water and cool off on a sheet pan.
3. Prepare the dressing for the root vegetables in a medium skillet. Saute onions in olive oil over medium heat for one minute, stirring with a wooden spoon. Stir in Dijon mustard, red wine vinegar, then add chicken stock. Bring to a boil, then season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
4. Toss the cooled root vegetables and warm dressing in a large bowl (leave out beets for later). Cover and let stand at room temperature until ready to serve.
5. Unwrap the striploins, season with salt, and grill over medium heat until medium rare, 3-4 minutes per side. Let rest before slicing.
6. Toss cilantro, scallions, and beets into the salad, adjusting seasoning if necessary. Spoon salad onto plates.
7. Slice meat over salad and garnish with arugula, apple slices (if using), and tortillas (if using).
